title: Unidentified Mandalore (Durge)
content:
{{Top|ca|leg}}
{{Otheruses|unidentified Mandalore}}
{{Conjecture|legends}}
{{Character
|type=Mandalorian
|image=
|name=Unidentified Mandalore (Durge)
|homeworld=
|birth=
|death=c. [[132 BBY/Legends|132 BBY]]<ref name="Akaliit">{{DB|character|durge|Durge}} establishes that the [[Mandalore (title)/Legends|Mandalore]] was [[Death/Legends|killed]] around one [[Standard century/Legends|hundred years]] before the [[Battle of Naboo/Legends|Battle of Naboo]], which corresponds to approximately [[132 BBY/Legends|132 BBY]] per ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''. ''[[The Bounty Hunter Code: From the Files of Boba Fett]]'' further establishes that the Mandalores during the [[Time/Legends|time]] period between the [[Mandalorian Excision]] and [[Jaster Mereel]] becoming Mandalore—events that ''[[The Essential Guide to Warfare]]'' dates to [[738 BBY]] and [[60 BBY/Legends|60 BBY]], respectively—belonged to the [[Aka'liit]] faction of the [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorians]].</ref>

At one point, an '''individual''' served as the [[Mandalore (title)/Legends|Mandalore]], the leader of<ref name="TCWCG" /> the [[Aka'liit]] faction of<ref name="Akaliit" /> the [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] warrior culture.<ref name="TCWCG" /> Around [[132 BBY/Legends|132 BBY]],<ref name="Akaliit" /> the long-lived [[Gen'Dai/Legends|Gen'Dai]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Durge/Legends|Durge]],<ref name="DB">{{DB|character|durge|Durge}}</ref> who was harboring a long-standing hatred of the Mandalorians,<ref name="TCWCG" /> was hired to [[Death/Legends|kill]] the Mandalore<ref name="DB" />—on whom a [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]] had been placed<ref name="Hasbro">{{HasbroCite|set=Star Wars (Hasbro toy line)|packtype='03 Basic Figure|pack=#46: Durge (Commander of the Separatist Forces)|altlink=https://www.rebelscum.com/CW0346durge.asp}}</ref>—a task that he successfully accomplished.<ref name="DB" /> However, the Mandalore's followers<ref name="TCWCG" /> subsequently struck back at the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty]] [[Hunting/Legends|hunter]] and, subduing and restraining him, [[Torture/Legends|tortured]] the Gen'Dai to the point of rendering him [[Brain/Legends|mentally]] unstable and necessitating for him to later spend nearly a [[Standard century/Legends|century]] in [[Suspended animation/Legends|hibernation]] in order to recuperate physically.<ref name="DB" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Mandalore was first mentioned in the [[StarWars.com]] [[Databank (original)|Databank]] entry for Durge, which was published at some point by [[October 24]], [[2003]].<ref name="DB" />

|after=Eventually [[Jaster Mereel]]<ref name="EGTW" />
|after-years=[[60 BBY/Legends|60 BBY]]<ref name="EGTW" />–[[52 BBY/Legends|52 BBY]]<ref name="52 BBY">[[Jango Fett: Open Seasons 2|''Jango Fett: Open Seasons'' 2]] dates the [[Battle of Korda Six|death]] of [[Jaster Mereel]] while serving as the leader of the [[True Mandalorians]]—with ''[[The Essential Guide to Warfare]]'' further specifying that he held the title of [[Mandalore (title)/Legends|Mandalore]]—to twenty [[Standard year/Legends|years]] before the [[Battle of Naboo/Legends|Battle of Naboo]], which corresponds to [[52 BBY/Legends|52 BBY]] per ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''.</ref>}}
{{EndBox}}
